title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・Der Blitz

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running with emotion makes Eishin Flash realize
something for the first time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals may have unyielding tenacity and what
it takes to make the final step toward victory, but
Eishin Flash desires to surpass them and become
number one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And when she's chosen to be highlighted in a
special article, she vows not only to be a "flash"
of greatness, but a lasting light that will shine on
to the very end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as the "end" of her schedule looms on the
horizon, I continue to push Eishin Flash toward
her greatest goal—the autumn Tenno Sho.
